backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing player management with shoot, revive, and score tracking functions using a Map to store Player records keyed by Principal.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including 3D Doom-style environment, combat mechanics, respawn system, battle royale loop, and dark industrial UI theme with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React files describing their roles in the game application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a dark Doom-themed color palette using OKLCH color space for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script tag loading the React application with title 'Doom Battle Royale'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for landing page and game page, wrapped in GameLayout component.
frontend/src/components/Game/CombatEffec: React Three Fiber component rendering a temporary orange point light at camera position on mousedown to simulate muzzle flash effect.
frontend/src/components/Game/DeathScreen: Full-screen overlay component displaying elimination message, final score, respawn countdown timer, and respawn button using useRespawn and usePlayerState hooks.
frontend/src/components/Game/FirstPerson: React Three Fiber component implementing WASD movement, mouse-look camera controls with pointer lock, and boundary collision detection for first-person navigation.
frontend/src/components/Game/GameArena.t: React Three Fiber component rendering a 20x20 unit arena with textured floor, four walls, and four central obstacle boxes using generated textures.
frontend/src/components/Game/GameScene.t: React Three Fiber scene container composing ambient/point lighting, fog, GameArena, FirstPersonControls, WeaponSystem, and CombatEffects components.
frontend/src/components/Game/Leaderboard: Displays a scrollable leaderboard showing all players sorted by score, with icons indicating alive/dead status and player rankings.
frontend/src/components/Game/PlayerHUD.t: Renders the in-game HUD overlay with crosshair, health bar, score display, and weapon icon using player state data.
frontend/src/components/Game/WeaponSyste: Handles mouse click events to trigger shooting with fire rate limiting, calling the shoot hook when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/Layout/GameLayou: Provides the main layout wrapper with footer containing attribution links and social media icons.
frontend/src/components/UI/DoomButton.ts: A styled button component with Doom-themed styling including clipped corners, hover effects, and gradient overlays.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance with authentication, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on identity state and invalidating dependent queries on changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login, logout, and identity management with delegation handling.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlayerState.ts: Manages player state queries including initialization, fetching all players, current player data, and shooting mutations with automatic refetching.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating game-specific queries are handled in other hook files.
frontend/src/hooks/useRespawn.ts: Handles player respawn logic with a countdown timer and mutation to revive the player, invalidating player queries on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with Doom-themed color variables, custom utilities for clipped corners and color classes, and font imports.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional className merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point setting up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then rendering the App component.
frontend/src/pages/GamePage.tsx: Main game page rendering the 3D Canvas with GameScene, conditionally displaying PlayerHUD and Leaderboard when alive or DeathScreen when dead.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page component with Doom-themed styling, animated background, game description, and an 'ENTER BATTLE' button that navigates to the game page.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom Doom-themed colors (doom-dark, doom-red, doom-orange, doom-green), neon shadow effects, custom fonts (Rajdhani, Orbitron), and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a Doom-style Battle Royale game with existing features for 3D environment, combat mechanics, respawn system, and game loop, plus pending backend player state management.
